description: The Accorinti are a 'ndrina (mafia clan) of the 'Ndrangheta based in Briatico, Tropea and Zungri, in the province of Vibo Valentia, Italy. Their existence was legally established in August 2020 following the 'Costa pulita' operation of 2016. They have ties with the Giampà 'ndrina of Lamezia Terme and the Mancuso clan. The clan is involved in drug trafficking, extortion, and other criminal activities.
